<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuuros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-tiū]][[de:Feuer-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de feu]][[hak:Tên-chhiú]][[ja:丁丑]][[ko:정축]][[nds:Füür-Oss]][[vi:Đinh Sửu]][[za:Dingcouj]][[zh_classical:丁丑]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-thiú]][[zh-yue:丁丑]][[zh:丁丑]]

'''Yin Fire Ox also known as Teichuu''' (丁丑) (ひのとうし、ていかのうし、ていちゅう) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 14th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is [[Yang Fire Rat]] and the following combination is [[Yang Earth Tiger]]. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ [[Hinoto (丁)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]’ [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], and they interact by [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]] (Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Ox (丁丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 cau2
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: teichū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongchuk (정축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Sửu

==Years of Yin Fire Ox==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 17 when divided by 60 is a [[Year]] of Teichuu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Teichuu'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 17|17 AD]]
* [[AD 77|77 AD]]
* [[AD 137|137 AD]]
* [[197|197 AD]]
* [[257|257 AD]]
* [[317|317 AD]]
* [[377|377 AD]]
* [[437|437 AD]]
* [[497|497 AD]]
* [[557|557 AD]]
* [[617|617 AD]]
* [[677|677 AD]]
* [[AD 737|737 AD]]
* [[797|797 AD]]
* [[857|857 AD]]
* [[917|917 AD]]
* [[977|977 AD]]
|
* [[1037|1037 AD]]
* [[1097|1097 AD]]
* [[1157|1157 AD]]
* [[1217|1217 AD]]
* [[1277|1277 AD]]
* [[1337|1337 AD]]
* [[1397|1397 AD]]
* [[1457|1457 AD]]
* [[1517|1517 AD]]
* [[1577|1577 AD]]
* [[1637|1637 AD]]
* [[1697|1697 AD]]
* [[1757|1757 AD]]
* [[1817|1817 AD]]
* [[1877|1877 AD]]
* [[1937|1937 AD]]
* [[1997|1997 AD]]
|
* [[2057 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2117 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2177 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2237 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2297 AD]]
* [[24th century|2357 AD]]
* [[2417 AD]]
* [[2477 AD]]
* [[2537 AD]]
* [[2597 AD]]
* [[2657 AD]]
* [[2717 AD]]
* [[2777 AD]]
* [[2837 AD]]
* [[2897 AD]]
* [[2957 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yin Fire Ox==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Tsuchinoto (己)]]), the month of [[December]] becomes the [[Month]] of Teichuu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[Xiaohan|Minor Cold]] until the day before [[Lichun|Risshun]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Ox==
The [[Senjitsu]] for a Teichuu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Teichuu day is an intercalary day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)]].
== See Also ==
[[zh-classical:丁丑]]

[[zh-classical:丁丑]]

{{wikidata link|Q1062543}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
